WORLDSMITH.Intro: Import Worldsmith creatures, companions, items, shops, and treasure. Creatures become dnd5e NPCs, items become dnd5e items, shops become Item Piles merchants (with their owners as separate NPCs), and treasure becomes Item Piles loot piles. Upload one or more .json files and/or paste JSON below; the type of each entry is detected automatically.
WORLDSMITH.FilesHint: You can select multiple files at once, mixing creatures and items.
WORLDSMITH.PastePlaceholder: Paste a single creature/item object or an array of them here...
WORLDSMITH.NoInput: Select at least one file or paste some JSON before importing.
WORLDSMITH.ImportSuccess: Imported {actors} actor(s) and {items} item(s) from Worldsmith.
